message:
Retain materialization buffer, single-pass UTF-8→UTF-16, SIMD widening

doc_materialize_free now just resets mat_len — buffer capacity retained
across eager parses (same pattern as doc_free parser retention).

Eliminated double-scan in string conversion: matWriteStringUtf16 now
allocates upper-bound space, converts in one pass, then patches the
char_count header. Removed utf8Utf16Len from all materialization and
string export paths.

Added SIMD128 fast path in utf8ToUtf16Le: processes 16 ASCII bytes at
once when all are < 0x80 (the common case for JSON keys/values).

JS side: cached full-memory DataView across parses (recreated only on
WASM memory growth), small-string optimization reads char-by-char via
DataView.getUint16 instead of creating Uint16Array views.
